# CloudThinker Documentation

> CloudThinker is a Multi-Agent System (MAS) platform for autonomous cloud operations. It provides AI agents that manage infrastructure, optimize costs, review code, respond to incidents, and enforce compliance across AWS, Azure, and GCP — all through natural language conversation.

CloudThinker uses specialized AI agents, each with domain expertise:
- **Alex**: Cloud Engineer — infrastructure management, cost optimization, multi-cloud architecture
- **Oliver**: Security Professional — compliance, vulnerability assessment, threat detection, IAM
- **Tony**: Database Engineer — query optimization, performance tuning, analytics
- **Kai**: Kubernetes Engineer — cluster management, container optimization, orchestration
- **Anna**: General Manager — multi-agent coordination, complex operations, executive reporting

Users interact with agents using natural language in a chat interface. Mention an agent with `@name` and use `#tool` to invoke specific capabilities (e.g., `@alex #dashboard Generate an AWS cost report`).

## Getting Started

- [CloudThinker Overview](https://docs.cloudthinker.io/index.md): AI-powered multi-agent platform for autonomous cloud operations across AWS, Azure, and GCP
- [Quick Start](https://docs.cloudthinker.io/quickstart.md): Get running with CloudThinker in 3 steps — create a workspace, connect your cloud, and start managing infrastructure with AI

## Tutorials

- [Setup Your Account](https://docs.cloudthinker.io/guide/tutorial/setup.md): Register, create workspace, connect cloud, invite team, and upgrade plan
- [VibeOps: Your First Conversation](https://docs.cloudthinker.io/guide/tutorial/vibeops.md): Learn conversational cloud operations with natural language
- [Code Review Tutorial](https://docs.cloudthinker.io/guide/tutorial/code-review.md): Connect repositories and get AI-powered code reviews on pull requests
- [CloudKeepers Tutorial](https://docs.cloudthinker.io/guide/tutorial/cloudkeepers.md): Enable autonomous pilots for continuous cloud monitoring
- [Assessment Tutorial](https://docs.cloudthinker.io/guide/tutorial/assessment.md): Run Well-Architected assessments on cloud resources
- [Deep Response Engine Setup Tutorial](https://docs.cloudthinker.io/guide/tutorial/incident-response.md): Connect monitoring tools so Pulse feeds AI-powered incident investigation automatically
- [Skills Tutorial](https://docs.cloudthinker.io/guide/tutorial/skills.md): Create custom skills to give AI agents your organization's domain-specific knowledge

## Pulse

- [Pulse](https://docs.cloudthinker.io/guide/pulse/overview.md): Unified signal monitoring — what it is, how the pipeline works, and what makes it different
- [Clusters & Suppression](https://docs.cloudthinker.io/guide/pulse/clusters.md): How Pulse groups related signals into clusters and eliminates noise through seven automatic layers
- [Pulse Setup](https://docs.cloudthinker.io/guide/pulse/setup.md): Connect AWS pollers, Slack, Teams, and third-party webhooks as signal sources
- [Pulse Analytics](https://docs.cloudthinker.io/guide/pulse/analytics.md): Measure signal volume, noise reduction, cluster resolution time, and source conversion rates

## Code Review

- [AI Code Review](https://docs.cloudthinker.io/guide/code-review/overview.md): AI-powered PR reviews that catch bugs, security vulnerabilities, and code quality issues before they reach production
- [Code Review Setup](https://docs.cloudthinker.io/guide/code-review/setup.md): Connect GitHub, GitLab, Bitbucket, or Azure DevOps repositories for automated AI-powered code reviews
- [Convention Rules](https://docs.cloudthinker.io/guide/code-review/convention-rules.md): Configure AI code reviews to follow your team's coding conventions using convention files already in your repository
- [Leaderboard](https://docs.cloudthinker.io/guide/code-review/leaderboard.md): Developer scoring formula balancing code quality with productivity
- [Code Review Analytics](https://docs.cloudthinker.io/guide/code-review/analytics.md): Track code review trends, developer performance, and team health
- [Skill Matrix](https://docs.cloudthinker.io/guide/code-review/skill-matrix.md): Visualize developer proficiency across code review domains
- [Mention Commands](https://docs.cloudthinker.io/guide/code-review/mention-commands.md): Interact with CloudThinker directly from MR/PR comments
- [Extensions](https://docs.cloudthinker.io/guide/code-review/extensions.md): Enrich code reviews with context from issue trackers

## Infrastructure

- [Infrastructure Management](https://docs.cloudthinker.io/guide/infrastructure/overview.md): Unified infrastructure management — resources, topology, cost, security, and compliance across AWS, GCP, and Azure
- [Resources](https://docs.cloudthinker.io/guide/infrastructure/resources.md): Infrastructure resources overview for CloudThinker operations
- [Topology](https://docs.cloudthinker.io/guide/infrastructure/topology.md): Visualize cloud infrastructure topology maps — trace dependencies, identify single points of failure, and accelerate incident investigation
- [CloudKeepers](https://docs.cloudthinker.io/guide/infrastructure/cloudkeepers.md): Autonomous keepers for cost, security, and performance optimization across AWS, GCP, and Kubernetes
- [Assessment](https://docs.cloudthinker.io/guide/infrastructure/assessment.md): Assess infrastructure health, compliance, and optimization
- [Plan](https://docs.cloudthinker.io/guide/infrastructure/plan.md): Plan infrastructure changes and automation
- [Infrastructure Analytics](https://docs.cloudthinker.io/guide/infrastructure/analytics.md): Analyze infrastructure performance, cost, and reliability trends across all connected cloud environments

## Cost Optimization

- [Cloud Cost Optimization](https://docs.cloudthinker.io/guide/cost-optimization/overview.md): AI-powered cost analysis and optimization across cloud infrastructure
- [Recommendations](https://docs.cloudthinker.io/guide/cost-optimization/recommendations.md): AI-generated cost optimization recommendations with prioritization
- [Cost Analytics](https://docs.cloudthinker.io/guide/cost-optimization/analytics.md): Real-time spending analysis, forecasting, and cost attribution
- [Savings Tracking](https://docs.cloudthinker.io/guide/cost-optimization/savings.md): Track implemented optimizations and measure actual cost savings

## Deep Response Engine

- [Deep Response Engine Overview](https://docs.cloudthinker.io/guide/incident/overview.md): From the first signal to a resolved incident — CloudThinker's end-to-end response loop
- [Manual Incident Logging](https://docs.cloudthinker.io/guide/incident/manual-logging.md): Create incidents manually when automated alerting isn't configured
- [Incident Webhook Integrations](https://docs.cloudthinker.io/guide/incident/webhook-integrations/overview.md): Connect alerting platforms to automatically create incidents
- [AWS CloudWatch](https://docs.cloudthinker.io/guide/incident/webhook-integrations/cloudwatch.md): Set up AWS CloudWatch alarms to create incidents via SNS webhook
- [Root Cause Analysis](https://docs.cloudthinker.io/guide/incident/root-cause-analysis.md): AI-powered investigation with hypothesis tracking and evidence chains
- [Incident Memory](https://docs.cloudthinker.io/guide/incident/incident-memory.md): AI that learns from past incidents to investigate new ones faster
- [Runbooks](https://docs.cloudthinker.io/guide/incident/runbooks.md): Connect operational runbooks so AI agents can execute remediation steps

## Connections

- [Connections Overview](https://docs.cloudthinker.io/guide/connections/overview.md): Connect cloud providers, databases, and services to CloudThinker
- [AWS](https://docs.cloudthinker.io/guide/connections/aws.md): Connect Amazon Web Services
- [Google Cloud](https://docs.cloudthinker.io/guide/connections/gcp.md): Connect Google Cloud Platform
- [Azure](https://docs.cloudthinker.io/guide/connections/azure.md): Connect Microsoft Azure
- [Cloudflare](https://docs.cloudthinker.io/guide/connections/cloudflare.md): Connect Cloudflare
- [PostgreSQL](https://docs.cloudthinker.io/guide/connections/postgresql.md): Connect PostgreSQL databases
- [Neon](https://docs.cloudthinker.io/guide/connections/neon.md): Connect Neon Postgres to CloudThinker with OAuth-powered MCP for project discovery, schema inspection, and database operations
- [MySQL](https://docs.cloudthinker.io/guide/connections/mysql.md): Connect MySQL databases
- [Kafka](https://docs.cloudthinker.io/guide/connections/kafka.md): Connect Kafka on Confluent Cloud with scope-based credentials
- [RabbitMQ](https://docs.cloudthinker.io/guide/connections/rabbitmq.md): Connect RabbitMQ via the Management HTTP API for queue depth, consumer lag, DLQ analysis, cluster and node health, and alarm monitoring
- [MongoDB](https://docs.cloudthinker.io/guide/connections/mongodb.md): Connect MongoDB databases
- [Jenkins](https://docs.cloudthinker.io/guide/connections/jenkins.md): Connect Jenkins CI/CD server
- [Redis](https://docs.cloudthinker.io/guide/connections/redis.md): Connect Redis databases (self-hosted, Upstash, Redis Cloud)
- [Kubernetes](https://docs.cloudthinker.io/guide/connections/kubernetes.md): Connect Kubernetes clusters
- [SSH](https://docs.cloudthinker.io/guide/connections/ssh.md): Connect your own servers over SSH for key-based shell command execution with trusted host keys
- [Elasticsearch](https://docs.cloudthinker.io/guide/connections/elasticsearch.md): Connect Elasticsearch
- [Grafana](https://docs.cloudthinker.io/guide/connections/grafana.md): Connect Grafana
- [Prometheus](https://docs.cloudthinker.io/guide/connections/prometheus.md): Connect Prometheus for read-only PromQL queries, metric discovery, target health, and alert inspection across Prometheus, Thanos, VictoriaMetrics, and Grafana Cloud
- [Atlassian](https://docs.cloudthinker.io/guide/connections/atlassian.md): Connect Atlassian (Jira, Confluence)
- [ArgoCD](https://docs.cloudthinker.io/guide/connections/argocd.md): Connect ArgoCD for GitOps operations and application management
- [AWX](https://docs.cloudthinker.io/guide/connections/awx.md): Connect Ansible AWX for job template execution, inventory management, and automation workflows
- [Flespi](https://docs.cloudthinker.io/guide/connections/flespi.md): Connect Flespi IoT telematics for GPS device management and fleet telemetry
- [Better Stack](https://docs.cloudthinker.io/guide/connections/betterstack.md): Connect Better Stack for uptime monitoring, incidents, on-call, and log search
- [ServiceNow](https://docs.cloudthinker.io/guide/connections/servicenow.md): Connect ServiceNow for incident, change request, problem, and CMDB management
- [Zabbix](https://docs.cloudthinker.io/guide/connections/zabbix.md): Connect Zabbix for infrastructure monitoring and alerting
- [SonarQube](https://docs.cloudthinker.io/guide/connections/sonarqube.md): Connect SonarQube for code quality analysis and security scanning
- [SigNoz](https://docs.cloudthinker.io/guide/connections/signoz.md): Connect SigNoz for logs, metrics, traces, alerts, and dashboards
- [Datadog](https://docs.cloudthinker.io/guide/connections/datadog.md): Connect Datadog for log search, metrics, and infrastructure monitoring
- [Rollbar](https://docs.cloudthinker.io/guide/connections/rollbar.md): Connect Rollbar for error triage, top errors, deployments, and approval-gated item updates
- [PagerDuty](https://docs.cloudthinker.io/guide/connections/pagerduty.md): Connect PagerDuty for on-call management and incident alerting
- [HashiCorp Vault](https://docs.cloudthinker.io/guide/connections/vault.md): Connect HashiCorp Vault to read KV secrets, issue dynamic credentials, and audit policies, tokens, and health using Token or AppRole authentication
- [Coralogix](https://docs.cloudthinker.io/guide/connections/coralogix.md): Connect Coralogix for log search, metrics, traces, incident triage, and pipeline health
- [HashiCorp Vault](https://docs.cloudthinker.io/guide/connections/vault.md): Connect HashiCorp Vault to read KV secrets, issue dynamic credentials, and audit policies, tokens, and health using Token or AppRole authentication
- [AppDynamics](https://docs.cloudthinker.io/guide/connections/appdynamics.md): Connect AppDynamics (Cisco) APM for application health monitoring, health-rule violation triage, metric review, and error-event analysis
- [Vercel](https://docs.cloudthinker.io/guide/connections/vercel.md): Connect Vercel to CloudThinker for project inventory, deployment inspection, runtime log triage, and domain auditing
- [MCP](https://docs.cloudthinker.io/guide/connections/mcp.md): Connect custom tools via Model Context Protocol

## Agent Configuration

- [Agent Configuration](https://docs.cloudthinker.io/guide/configuration.md): Configure agent settings, tools, connections, and instructions for CloudThinker AI agents
- [Customize Agents](https://docs.cloudthinker.io/guide/agents/customize.md): Edit how default agents talk, choose what they can reach, and create your own agents
- [Approval](https://docs.cloudthinker.io/guide/approval.md): Configure agent approval settings and tool permissions
- [Auto Mode](https://docs.cloudthinker.io/guide/auto-mode.md): Let AI approve agent actions automatically so chats flow without click-by-click approval
- [Capabilities](https://docs.cloudthinker.io/guide/capabilities.md): Agent output capabilities — dashboards, reports, slides, and more
- [Alex](https://docs.cloudthinker.io/guide/agents/alex.md): Cloud Engineer — cost optimization, infrastructure management, multi-cloud architecture
- [Oliver](https://docs.cloudthinker.io/guide/agents/oliver.md): Security Professional — compliance, vulnerability assessment, threat detection, IAM
- [Tony](https://docs.cloudthinker.io/guide/agents/tony.md): Database Engineer — query optimization, performance tuning, analytics
- [Kai](https://docs.cloudthinker.io/guide/agents/kai.md): Kubernetes Engineer — cluster management, container optimization, orchestration
- [Anna](https://docs.cloudthinker.io/guide/agents/anna.md): General Manager — multi-agent coordination, complex operations, executive reporting
- [Operations Hub](https://docs.cloudthinker.io/guide/operations-hub.md): 325+ pre-built operations for cloud management — run infrastructure tasks, security checks, and cost analysis without writing prompts
- [Prompt Reference](https://docs.cloudthinker.io/guide/language.md): Complete reference for agent mentions, tool commands, and prompt patterns

## Platform Configuration

- [Organizations](https://docs.cloudthinker.io/guide/organization.md): Manage organization settings, members, and billing
- [Workspaces](https://docs.cloudthinker.io/guide/workspaces.md): Create and manage cloud operations workspaces
- [Workspace Members](https://docs.cloudthinker.io/guide/workspace-users.md): Manage member access and roles within your CloudThinker workspace
- [Workspace Branding](https://docs.cloudthinker.io/guide/workspace-branding.md): Apply your company logo, name, and chart color palette to artifact PDF exports and in-app charts
- [Recurring Tasks](https://docs.cloudthinker.io/guide/recurring-tasks.md): Schedule automated tasks on a regular cadence
- [Knowledge Base](https://docs.cloudthinker.io/guide/knowledge.md): Enhance AI agents with organizational knowledge and procedures
- [Notifications](https://docs.cloudthinker.io/guide/notifications.md): Configure role-specific notifications across email and Slack
- [Slack Integration](https://docs.cloudthinker.io/guide/slack-integration.md): Run CloudThinker AI operations directly from Slack — manage infrastructure, review costs, and investigate incidents
- [Microsoft Teams Integration](https://docs.cloudthinker.io/guide/teams-integration.md): Run CloudThinker operations directly from Microsoft Teams
- [BYOK](https://docs.cloudthinker.io/guide/byok.md): Use your own AWS Bedrock credentials for unlimited LLM usage

## Automation

- [Autonomous Agents](https://docs.cloudthinker.io/guide/automation/autonomous-agents.md): Configure agents for continuous monitoring, optimization, and operations
- [Tasks & Scheduling](https://docs.cloudthinker.io/guide/automation/tasks.md): Create, schedule, and manage automated tasks for recurring operations

## Security

- [Security & Authentication](https://docs.cloudthinker.io/guide/security/overview.md): MFA, SSO, and role-based access control
- [SSO Setup](https://docs.cloudthinker.io/guide/security/sso.md): Configure SAML or OIDC single sign-on
- [SCIM Provisioning](https://docs.cloudthinker.io/guide/security/scim.md): Automate user and group provisioning from your identity provider

## Artifacts & Webhooks

- [Artifacts](https://docs.cloudthinker.io/guide/artifacts/overview.md): Generate reports, build dashboards, and export data
- [Webhooks](https://docs.cloudthinker.io/guide/webhooks/overview.md): Send CloudThinker events to external systems
- [Billing](https://docs.cloudthinker.io/guide/billing/overview.md): Manage subscription, billing, credits, and usage quotas

## Skills

- [Skills Overview](https://docs.cloudthinker.io/guide/skills/overview.md): Extend AI agents with domain-specific knowledge, custom workflows, and organization-specific procedures
- [Custom Skills](https://docs.cloudthinker.io/guide/skills/custom-skills.md): Create, upload, and manage workspace-level skills that give AI agents specialized knowledge
- [Skill Format](https://docs.cloudthinker.io/guide/skills/skill-format.md): How to write effective SKILL.md files — structure, frontmatter, and best practices

## Use Cases

- [Actionable Dashboards](https://docs.cloudthinker.io/guide/use-cases/actionable-dashboards.md): Transform raw data into actionable dashboards instantly on AWS
- [Continuous Cloud Guardrails](https://docs.cloudthinker.io/guide/use-cases/continuous-cloud-guardrails.md): Establish continuous cost, security, and operational guardrails
- [Code Review Automation](https://docs.cloudthinker.io/guide/use-cases/code-review-automation.md): Streamline code reviews with Jira and Confluence integration
- [Incident Root Cause Analysis](https://docs.cloudthinker.io/guide/use-cases/incident-root-cause-analysis.md): Accelerate RCA for cloud incidents
- [Kubernetes Health Monitoring](https://docs.cloudthinker.io/guide/use-cases/kubernetes-health-monitoring.md): Automated K8s health monitoring on Amazon EKS
- [Multi-AWS Accounts](https://docs.cloudthinker.io/guide/use-cases/multi-aws-accounts.md): Best practices for managing multiple AWS accounts
- [Topology RCA](https://docs.cloudthinker.io/guide/use-cases/topology-rca.md): Use Topology Explorer for faster incident resolution

## Optional

- [FAQ](https://docs.cloudthinker.io/learn/faq.md): Frequently asked questions about CloudThinker
- [Pricing](https://docs.cloudthinker.io/pricing.md): Simple per-seat pricing with generous free tier
